parameters.query: SELECT f.account_id, a.name AS account, string_agg(('- was '''||f.verdict||''''||COALESCE(', should be '''||f.correct_type||'''','')||COALESCE(': '||f.reason,'')), E'\n' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC) AS notes FROM feedback f JOIN accounts a ON a.id=f.account_id WHERE f.account_id IS NOT NULL AND f.created_at > now() - interval '90 days' GROUP BY f.account_id, a.name;

parameters.content:
## Feedback Summary — the learning loop
06:30 weekdays: gather all human corrections per account → ask the AI to distil 3-5 lessons → save to `accounts.feedback_summary`.

The **Main Pipeline reads this** and adds it to the classifier prompt, so the brain stops repeating corrected mistakes. Not model retraining — in-context learning.
